name: the intake reports in-scope-but-unprobed namespaces explicitly so coverage gaps are never silent
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "REST API on AWS with a CI/CD pipeline on GitHub Actions and Jenkins" --classify 2>c.err; grep -qE 'unprobed_in_scope=' c.err && echo unprobed-reported 1>&2
